title: Does Monday need further improvement on project overviews and drill down into detail?

posts.author: MabRoj (Mabel Rojas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

My name is Mabel, I am part of the Research team at a Software company, a partner of Monday. Great to meet you, albeit virtually!

We’re running this survey to increase our understanding of what pain points are experienced by users, like you. As an active user of Monday, your experience is invaluable to us, we’re looking to understand your needs so we can build functionalities that truly improve your work.

Would you be up for a 5 min-survey?

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact me.
